name: literag
description: Local retrieval skill for large documentation corpora using independent SQLite knowledge libraries with keyword plus vector hybrid search. Supports search, inspect, index, status, meta, and benchmark workflows for large external doc sets.
author: Little Jax

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE
env_vars.description: Optional explicit OpenClaw workspace root. Preferred override for workspace detection; when set, LiteRAG resolves .literag/knowledge-libs.json and default sqlite paths under this workspace instead of walking parent directories.

env_vars.name: WORKSPACE
env_vars.description: Fallback workspace root override used only when OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE is unset.

env_vars.name: LITERAG_PYTHON
env_vars.description: Optional Python interpreter override for the packaged wrappers. Preferred over the Homebrew Python default when you need a specific interpreter or venv.
